excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that fallback decoding is a matched decoder-only transformer
a claim that strict seed-local support coverage solves held-out phase-cued retrieval
a claim that this deterministic cue-copy diagnostic is positional-method promotion evidence
supported: A support fallback strictness diagnostic over the Stage 59 seed-local lookup row family.
Evidence about whether Stage 59's threshold-crossing result depends on fallback decoding for query residues absent from seed-local train support.
Fair reporting across the same RoPE/ALiBI/sinusoidal/no-position/PhaseWrap method set, with failed-run retention.

decision.claim_boundary: Phase-cued retrieval crosses threshold only with fallback decoding; strict known-support decoding does not support promotion.

fallback_mod16.claim_boundary: fallback_mod16 solves retrieval for no-position too; this is not positional-method promotion.

strict_known_only.claim_boundary: strict_known_only solves at least one retrieval lane but not the full retrieval set.

support_policy_modes.fallback_mod16: Stage59 behavior: unseen query residues fall back to reference_delta mod 16.
support_policy_modes.strict_known_only: Unseen query residues receive only the distance prior, not an exact/phase cue.
